hero.title: Know exactly where everything is.
hero.subtitle: StorageHo gives your household one shared inventory for home and storage: locations, rooms, boxes, items, photos, QR labels, and move history.

cta.title: Ready to stop guessing where things are?
cta.subtitle: Create your household, add your first location, and label boxes in minutes.

preview.title: Live inventory snapshot
preview.subtitle: Track what you own and exactly where it sits.

activity.a: Moved 2x camping mugs to Basement Shelf 3
activity.b: Added photo to Winter Gear Box

preview.imageAlt: Diagram showing how StorageHo works from household to locations, rooms, boxes, and items.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to continue to your workspace.
login.switch: Don't have an account? Create one

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.generic: We couldn’t sign you in. Please try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Start building in minutes.
register.switch: Already have an account? Log in

errors.userExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.generic: We couldn’t create your account. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We’ll email you a secure reset link.
forgot.successDescription: Check your inbox for a password reset link.
forgot.errorDescription: We couldn’t send the reset email. Try again.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password to finish resetting your account.
reset.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.errorDescription: Please verify the link and try again.
reset.tokenErrorDescription: Your reset link is missing or expired. Request a new one.

dashboard.emptySubtitle: Create a household or choose one to continue organizing locations, boxes, and items.

header.title: Your profile
header.subtitle: Manage your account settings and subscription.

account.emailHint: Email is read-only in this demo.

subscription.cardSubtitle: View and manage your current plan.
subscription.checkoutSuccessPendingDescription: We received your payment and are finalizing your subscription. Refresh in a moment to see the latest status.
subscription.checkoutCancelDescription: No changes were made to your subscription.

pricing.title: Simple plans for every home
pricing.subtitle: Start free, then upgrade when you need higher limits and collaboration.

pro.title: Plus
pro.description: For active households with more gear

business.title: Family
business.description: For heavy storage and advanced usage

pricing.missingPrice: This plan is unavailable right now. Contact support to enable billing.

items.title: Shared household workspaces
items.desc: Invite partner or family with owner, admin, member, and viewer roles.

items.title: Location hierarchy
items.desc: Organize Location -> Room/Zone -> Box, with support for nested boxes.

items.title: Item library with quantities
items.desc: Track items, aliases, serials/barcodes, notes, and quantities per container.

items.title: Move and split stock
items.desc: Move full or partial quantity between boxes with a complete audit trail.

items.title: Global fuzzy search
items.desc: Search items, tags, containers, rooms, and locations in one fast command bar.

items.title: Tags and filters
items.desc: Tag both items and boxes, then filter large inventories quickly.

items.title: Private photo storage
items.desc: Upload original + thumbnail images and serve them through signed URLs.

items.title: QR labels and print sheets
items.desc: Generate deep-link QR labels and print A4 sheets for boxes in each location.

items.title: CSV import and export
items.desc: Export household data or import with dry-run preview before commit.

items.title: Activity history + PWA
items.desc: Review who changed what, and use StorageHo quickly on mobile in storage areas.

support.contactSupportDescription: Have a question or problem? Send us a message.
support.noSuggestionsYet: No suggestions or bug reports yet.
support.sent: Your message has been sent. We’ll get back to you soon.
support.responseTime: We usually respond within one business day.
support.subject: Subject
support.roadmapDescription: Vote on what you want next. Track progress as we ship.
